description: Guardrails AI provides tooling for validating and structuring LLM inputs and outputs using reusable validators and guard definitions. Its product includes a validator hub, a local/server runtime, and client libraries for embedding these checks into applications.
summary: Guardrails AI exposes a Python-installed CLI plus self-hosted HTTP surfaces: a Guardrails Server REST API and an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, with Hub-issued API keys used by the CLI and documented as a client/server credential.
